description: Phase 17 - Launch Readiness Gate: Run all hard gates, verify Docker/Helm/Terraform, check for production fallback secrets, verify WebSocket auth, verify critical flow test coverage, README setup, demo mode, error/metrics/logging. Update all state files with final launch readiness report.
steps: Run all 6 quality gates and capture output: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, pnpm typecheck, pnpm build, pnpm test, pnpm lint, pnpm audit --audit-level=high

Validate Dockerfiles: check that at least the key services (identity, chat-api, mail-api, ai-api) have valid Dockerfiles that would build (inspect structure, confirm FROM/COPY/CMD patterns are correct)
Validate Helm chart: run 'helm template' on infra/helm/quant-platform/ or validate the YAML structure manually if helm CLI is not available
Check for production fallback secrets: grep for hardcoded secrets, default passwords, or fallback JWT secrets in server code (packages/server/src/, services/)
Verify WebSocket auth is implemented (check services/ws-gateway/ or packages/realtime/ for JWT auth on WS connections)
Verify critical flows have test coverage: check that chat, mail, AI assistant, auth, agent-runtime, search, notifications all have meaningful tests
Verify README setup instructions work: check README.md has accurate setup steps
Verify demo mode exists: check packages/onboarding/src/demo-mode.ts exists and is functional
Verify error/metrics/logging exists: check packages/observability/ for logging, metrics, error tracking
Update .agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json with phase-16 and phase-17 completed, all gates passing
Update .agents/state/quant-phase-log.md with Phase 16 and Phase 17 entries including command output evidence
Update .agents/state/quant-launch-gates.md with comprehensive launch readiness report covering all hard gates
acceptance_criteria: All 6 pnpm quality gates pass (install, typecheck, build, test, lint, audit)
Dockerfiles for production services exist and have valid structure
Helm chart templates are valid YAML
No production fallback secrets found in server code
Critical flows have test coverage documented
State files updated with final launch status
